entity.label: Amphipolis
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: city on both sides, a Macedonian city, a great Roman military station, through which Paul and Silas passed on their way from Philippi to Thessalonica, a distance of 33Roman miles from Philippi ( Acts 17:1 ).

nodes.label: Amphipolis
nodes.description: city on both sides, a Macedonian city, a great Roman military station, through which Paul and Silas passed on their way from Philippi to Thessalonica, a distance of 33Roman miles from Philippi ( Acts 17:1 ).

verses.text: Now when they had passed through Amphipolis and Apollonia, they came to Thessalonica, where was a synagogue of the Jews:
